name: Forklift tipped over on job no training given can I sue someone?

mainEntity.name: Forklift tipped over on job no training given can I sue someone?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp + third-party suit for defective/lack training.[2][4]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Comp covers; sue manufacturer or trainer for negligence if third-party.** OSHA requires training; violations aid proof.[4] Key factors: Show lack of certification caused accident.[2][4] Punitive if gross negligence.[1]

description: Comp + third-party suit for defective/lack training.[2][4]
